docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NELLIE BRENNER, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT HERMANITAS DISENADORAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERMANITAS DISENADORAS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPERANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ACOSTA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT HERMANITAS DISENADORAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, VICTORIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUL-04-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERMANITAS DISENADORAS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA ACOSTA, ASSITED BY PATRICE BINAISA, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERMINITAS DISENADORAS IS NOT PRESENT .COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS (COPY OF 2 CHECKS TOTALING $1,000.00) ARE REVIEWED RETURNED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, VICTORIA
REMARK: CONTINUANCE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED, RETURN TO SENDER, VACANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-11-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA ACOSTA IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT HERMINITAS DISENADORAS, REPRESENTED BY NELLIE BRENNER, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $500.00 A MONTH FOR FIVE MONTHS FOR A TOTAL OF $2,500 BEGINNING ON AUGUST 31, 2021, WITH FINAL PAYMENT ON DECEMBER 31, 2021. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE BY CHECK VIA MAIL. PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SET, IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. APPEAREANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT MET AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
